indexing._comment: Controls how much content is stored per source type.

_mode_options: structured — id, url, text, priority per requirement item (default, compact)
full       — structured + page-level intro/context paragraph(s) per category
full    — title, summary, topics + all sections with content (default)
summary — title, summary, topics only (no sections, minimal size)

_comment_overrides: Per-source mode override: add 'indexing_mode' to any entry in requirements_overrides or blueprints_overrides to override the global mode for that single source.
